# The Laurel Room
> Brampton's first boutique event venue for intimate celebrations of 50-125 guests.

## About
The Laurel Room is an intimate, beautifully styled event venue in Brampton, Ontario, opening Summer 2026. Founded by Khushbu Dhahan, it fills a gap in the market: no premium intimate venue for 50-125 guests existed in a city of 700,000+ people. We operate a BYOC (Bring Your Own Caterer) model with five curated design presets.

## Key Facts
- Location: Brampton, Ontario, Canada (Steeles Ave East corridor)
- Capacity: 50-125 seated guests
- Model: BYOC (Bring Your Own Caterer) — families bring their own food, music, vendors
- Pricing: $895-$2,995 per event (3 tiers + signature packages)
- Opening: Summer 2026
- Founder: Khushbu Dhahan
- Phone: 647-286-1161
- Email: hello@thelaurelroom.ca
- Website: https://thelaurelroom.ca
- Instagram: @thelaurelroom

## Packages

### The Space — Your Blank Canvas
Venue rental with tables, chairs, kitchenette access for up to 125 guests. Includes 12 harvest tables, 125 cross-back chairs, Bluetooth speaker, WiFi, 20+ parking spaces, and basic setup/cleanup.

| Day | Price |
|---|---|
| Monday-Thursday | $895 |
| Friday & Sunday | $1,195 |
| Saturday | $1,395 |

### The Styled Experience — Walk Into a Fully Styled Room
Everything in The Space, plus: choice of 5 design presets, linen tablecloths, cloth napkins, gold or brass charger plates, styled centerpieces, statement backdrop arch, LED uplighting in preset color, fairy light canopy, and full professional setup & teardown.

| Day | Price |
|---|---|
| Monday-Thursday | $1,695 |
| Friday & Sunday | $1,995 |
| Saturday | $2,195 |

### The Full Celebration — Every Detail Handled
Everything in The Styled Experience, plus: full-day access (10 AM - 11 PM), dedicated event coordinator, premium design upgrades, styled cake & gift table, welcome easel with custom sign, enhanced lighting package, and head table premium styling.

| Day | Price |
|---|---|
| Monday-Thursday | $2,495 |
| Friday & Sunday | $2,695 |
| Saturday | $2,995 |

### Signature Packages
- The Mehndi Night ($2,195): Fri/Sat, 6 PM - 12 AM. Floor cushion + low-table arrangement, warm moody lighting, henna station area, enhanced sound.
- The Morning Celebration ($1,095): Any day, 10 AM - 2 PM. Perfect for aqiqah, naming ceremony, christening, or brunch shower. Soft natural lighting.
- The Corporate Retreat ($795): Mon-Thu, 4-hour block. Projector & screen, whiteboard, coffee station. Invoice-ready for your business.

### Time Blocks
- Block A (Daytime): 10:00 AM - 3:30 PM (5.5 hours)
- Block B (Evening): 5:30 PM - 11:00 PM (5.5 hours)
- Full Day: 10:00 AM - 11:00 PM
- Weekend double-booking available — morning and evening blocks on the same day.

## Add-Ons Menu
- Overtime: $175/hr
- Balloon garland: $300-$550
- Serving staff: $40/hr each
- Chafing dish set (4): $140
- Photo booth: $450-$650
- Projector & screen: $125
- Premium PA + wireless mics: $175
- Floor cushion / low seating: $250
- Fresh floral upgrade: from $350
- Custom vinyl on arch: $85
- Kids' corner setup: $175
- Full-service coordination: from $500

All prices subject to 13% HST.

## Design Presets
1. Laurel — Sage green, botanical, eucalyptus, romantic. Botanical garden meets rustic romance with pillar candles and warm cream.
2. Golden Hour — Warm amber, antique brass, candlelight, moody. Deeply romantic sunset atmosphere with antique accents.
3. Blush — Dusty pink, rose gold, peonies, feminine. Soft, delicate, and romantic with cream and rose gold accents.
4. Monochrome — Black/white, modern, clean lines. Sleek sophistication with silver and clear acrylic.
5. Regal — Jewel tones, gold, crystal, dramatic opulence. Grand celebration with deep jewel tones and crystal accents.

## Event Types
Mehndi nights, baby showers, bridal showers, intimate weddings, nikkah ceremonies, aqiqahs, milestone birthdays, engagement parties, corporate events, holiday celebrations (Diwali, Eid)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What does BYOC mean?
Bring Your Own Caterer. You choose any caterer you want — we provide the venue, styling, and kitchen facilities for warming and plating. Serve halal, vegetarian, Caribbean, Filipino, or any cuisine your family loves. No mandatory in-house catering. No food minimums. No cultural compromises.

### Can we serve alcohol?
Yes. Clients arrange a Special Occasion Permit (SOP) through the AGCO. A Smart Serve-certified server is required. We can guide you through the process.

### What's included in the styled packages?
Everything you see in the photos: linen tablecloths, cloth napkins, charger plates, styled centerpieces, a statement backdrop arch, LED uplighting in your chosen preset color, fairy light canopy, and full professional setup and teardown.

### How far in advance should we book?
We recommend booking 3-6 months in advance for weekend dates, especially during peak season (September-December). Weekday dates are often available on shorter notice.

### Is the venue accessible?
Yes. The venue is on the ground floor with step-free access, accessible parking, and accessible washrooms.

## Founder Bio — Khushbu Dhahan
Khushbu Dhahan founded The Laurel Room after years of frustration with the event venue landscape in Brampton. With a career in government program delivery — managing complex operations, budgets, compliance, and stakeholder coordination — she brings strong operational expertise to running a venue. As a mother planning celebrations for her own family, she experienced firsthand the gap in the market: no beautiful, intimate venue existed in Brampton for 50-125 guests. Oversized banquet halls forced families into mandatory catering packages. Community centres offered fluorescent lights and folding chairs. Or families drove 45 minutes to Toronto for something that looked good in photos. The Laurel Room is her answer: a warm, romantic space with soaring 18-foot ceilings, five curated design presets, and complete BYOC freedom — purpose-built for the celebrations Brampton families actually have.

## Market Context
Brampton, Ontario is a city of over 700,000 people — one of Canada's youngest, most vibrant, and fastest-growing communities. Over 50% South Asian, with thriving Caribbean, Filipino, and East African communities, Brampton families celebrate constantly: mehndi nights, baby showers, milestone birthdays, aqiqahs, engagement parties, and intimate weddings. Despite this demand, there was no premium intimate venue for 50-125 guests. The existing options were oversized banquet halls (200+ capacity) with mandatory in-house catering, or institutional community centres with basic facilities. The Laurel Room fills this gap with a purpose-built boutique venue that combines an industrial-romantic aesthetic (18-foot ceilings, warm wood floors, fairy light canopy) with the BYOC flexibility that multicultural families need. It is the only BYOC venue in Brampton with an elevated aesthetic and transparent pricing.

## Competitive Advantage
- Only BYOC venue in Brampton with an elevated aesthetic
- Purpose-built for 50-125 guests (not a partitioned banquet hall)
- Industrial-romantic aesthetic with 18-foot ceilings
- Five curated design presets (not bare-bones)
- Transparent pricing (no hidden fees)
- Deep understanding of multicultural celebrations
